narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 3-E (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,155 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
